name: French Fry Spam Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen french fry potatoes, thawed (20 oz)
1 can Condensed cream of chicken soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, cheese, sour cream, and soup.
3. Stir in the SPAM, bell pepper, and green onion.
4. Pour the mixture into a 13x9-inch baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with crushed corn flakes.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
